title: Stonedgoldfish's Original Characters
description: This is a collection of my very own original custom origins for the Origins mod for Minecraft. These origins are a kind of RPG fantasy characters, each with their own theme and special abilities.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3460b30f326e6cd2471bfdb9c3f6abdd9ec3af3.png)
# **WARNING**
**ONLY ONE PERSON MAY USE EACH ORIGIN AT A TIME**. THERE IS NO CURRENT EFFECTIVE WAY THAT I FOUND TO PREVENT THESE ORIGINS BEING CHOSEN WHEN ONE PLAYER ALREADY HAS IT, SO BE CAREFUL WITH THIS. **YOU MAY USE ORIGIN CAP IF ON FABRIC TO DO THIS**. Currently does not work on multiplayer, not because the characters themselves are incompatible, but because the datapack is too large (I think). I am currently working on a fix.
# StonedGoldfish's Original Characters
This is a datapack for the Origins mod in Minecraft. This datapack brings RPG styled characters to the origins mod in the form of a datapack. Each character has a specific use that will permit you to play minecraft more easily in certain ways. Adding difficulty mods to minecraft would certaintly spice things up!

So far this pack adds 17 characters, and are part of a team called the Protectors of the Cube.

This datapack introduces:
- The Beyonder, an extra-terrestrial being from the stars.
- The Drifter, an interdimensional being.
- The Speedster, fastest man alive.
- The Guardian, living tank and weapon.
- The Mender, healing support for his allies.
- The Marine, a warrior from the depths.
- The Smith, a volcanic legend.
- The Mimic, an experimental survivor.
- The Android, an artificial construct.
- The Champion, a self-trained superhuman.
- The Adaptive, an unkillable creature.
- And more!

As you can see, not at all related to certain fictional characters. 100% original. 

Check my wiki for details on the characters!

# Bonus Information
- Minecraft Version: 1.20.2+
- Mod Loader: Fabric/Forge (Fabric is recommended)
- Number of characters: 17
- Public use: Yes
- Modifications: Only with Owner's permission
- Porting: Not allowed
- Recording: Allowed, you may post videos about this in any platform

![Support me!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/411290ac9f8d0bcc1b2f78416c456e68b940c36d.png)

Support me on Ko-fi! Only if you want though... Might have sneak peeks there...
